title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic feature that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates creating a fully functional responsive landing page with UI components and downloadable code in minutes using AI-driven design generation.
